name: @auths/verifier
description: Auths attestation verification library for TypeScript/JavaScript

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:wasm: cd ../../crates/auths-verifier && wasm-pack build --target bundler --no-default-features --features wasm && cp -r pkg/ ../../packages/auths-verifier-ts/wasm
scripts.build:ts: tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && cp -r wasm dist/wasm

author: auths
